message:
fix(consumer): use max_deliver=3 in redelivery test to match actual contract

The test expected redelivery to succeed, but FabricConsumerConfig::default()
sets max_deliver=1 which means only one delivery attempt is allowed.
With delivery_attempt=1 and next_attempt=2 > max_deliver=1, the
redelivery was correctly rejected as DeadLetter.  Bump to max_deliver=3
so the test exercises the intended redelivery path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
